nasb.text: Barak called Zebulun and Naphtali together to Kedesh, and ten thousand men went up with him; Deborah also went up with him.

esv.text: And Barak called out Zebulun and Naphtali to Kedesh. And 10,000 men went up at his heels, and Deborah went up with him.

cnv.text: 巴拉就召集西布倫人和拿弗他利人到基低斯；與他一同步行上去的有一萬人，底波拉也與他一同上去。

ccb.text: 巴拉招聚了一万名拿弗他利人和西布伦人，底波拉与他一起出征。
